positive: A mystical forest scene viewed through a semi-circular wreath of glowing bioluminescent flowers and leaves. The central element is a stylized, elegant fox silhouette perched on a mossy log, looking into the distance. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, utilizing a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and glowing gold accents. Include subtle geometric, Art Nouveau-inspired line work detailing the foliage and fox fur. High contrast, clean silhouette style, vector art aesthetics, suitable for a screen print or tapestry. Perfect composition for apparel, minimal shading, strong lines, flat graphic style, UHD, intricate detail.
